rows.label: qev030605_MSG0001
rows.name:
Bwahahahahahah!
Booze! Bring more booze! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030605_MSG0002
rows.name:
...Alright! You drink too!
At a joyous time like this, drinking like a big snakey
is just common courtesy, zo! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030605_MSG0003
rows.name:
Fwaha! Are you drinking properly?
Here! A toast to celebrate their marriage, zo! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030605_MSG0004
rows.name:
Uncle, you're drinking too much, na.
You're not young anymore, so you should hold back, na. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030605_MSG0005
rows.name:
Ggh... Liana...
Are you treating me like an old man too! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030605_MSG0006
rows.name:
I'm still an active warrior, da!
Damn it! Bring me the Cavern Clan right now!
I'll knock them down in a single blow! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030605_MSG0007
rows.name:
Fwaha!
Feeling the outside breeze like this
sobered me up just right, zo. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030605_MSG0008
rows.name:
I'm fully prepared on this end, da.
How about you, are you ready to go? [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030605_JNK0010
rows.name: Affirm[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030605_SEL0011
rows.name: Nod and take a combat stance.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030605_JNK0020
rows.name: Deny[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030605_SEL0021
rows.name: Say you are not prepared yet.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030605_MSG0009
rows.name:
Alright!
Then, praying for Nemard's happiness...
Let the battle begin! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030605_MSG0010
rows.name:
You're facing me, da.
With ordinary resolve, you'll end up badly injured, zo!
Make sure you come fully prepared! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030605_MSG0011
rows.name:
That spoiled boy Nemard
has the face of a man before I even realized it, zo.
Hmm... I suppose there's no problem with his mental readiness, da. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030605_MSG0012
rows.name:
Now he just needs to acquire the strength
to protect his family from anyone.
Heh heh, I'll train him thoroughly, zo! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030605_MSG0013
rows.name:

Booze! Bring more booze! [ST:wait ]
